title: Add Poiseuille flow simulation to LBM
Implement LBM CFD sample in cfd_lbm directory

close_reason: Implemented D2Q9 LBM in cfd_lbm/ with lid-driven cavity flow, BGK collision, Zou-He BC, and Ghia benchmark comparison

title: Compute cylinder flow simulation

title: Compute lid-driven cavity flow using LBM
description: Run the D2Q9 LBM lid-driven cavity flow simulation in src/cfd_lbm/lbm.py. Produce results for Re=400 (Ghia 1982 benchmark) with velocity magnitude, streamline, vorticity, and centerline comparison plots saved under results/.
close_reason: Ran D2Q9 LBM lid-driven cavity flow at Re=400, 30k steps, 128x128 grid. Results saved to results/. Noted Zou-He BC bug (lines 171-173 override correct Zou-He on 166-168) causing quantitative mismatch with Ghia 1982 benchmark.
